title: EXTRA HELP - 211info
text: UNITED STATES SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION EXTRA HELP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance to Medicare Prescription Drug program recipients who have limited resources with prescription costs, including monthly premiums, annual deductibles, and prescription co-payments. Eligibility: -1 person household income limit of $23,475 and resource limit of $17,600 -2 person household income limit of $31,725 and resource limit of $35,130 Resource limits do not count home, one car, burial plot, furniture/ other household and personal items, and up to $1,500 for burial expenses if money has been set aside. Hours: Monday-Friday 4am-4pm (800) 772-1213 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 772-1213 TTY/TTD (800) 325-0778 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to apply FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Social Security card -Tax returns -Payroll slips -Bank account statements, including checking, savings, and certificates of deposit -Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs), stocks, bonds, savings bonds, mutual funds, other investment statements -Most recent Social Security benefits award letters or statements for Railroad Retirement benefits, Veterans benefits, pensions and annuities LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Prescription Expense Assistance * Medicare Beneficiaries Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL INSURANCE PROGRAMS - SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
